name: JR Task
description: Implement one focused task inside a JR feature branch, then hand off for review.

steps.name: assign
steps.prompt:
Prepare to implement this JRTASK.

Read the parent feature handoff, dependencies, acceptance criteria, and relevant repo files. Write a narrow task plan to `.tickets/jr/{{ feature_id }}/tasks/{{ id }}.md`. If dependencies are unmet, stop and document the blocker.

steps.name: code
steps.prompt:
Implement only this JRTASK.

Stay on the parent feature branch/worktree. Keep the change small and reviewable. Do not take adjacent tasks. Update the task note with changed files and decisions.

steps.name: test
steps.prompt:
Validate this JRTASK.

Run targeted tests and the task's required quality commands. Add or update tests for changed behavior. Record evidence in `.tickets/jr/{{ feature_id }}/tasks/{{ id }}.md`.

steps.name: review
steps.prompt:
Perform a fresh JR code review for this task.

Review the diff for correctness, scope discipline, tests, style, hidden regressions, and whether acceptance criteria are met. Write actionable findings into the task note. Approve only if it is ready for the parent feature.

on_reject.prompt:
JR code review requested changes: {{ rejection_reason }}

Return to task implementation, fix the issues, and rerun tests.

steps.name: close
steps.prompt:
Close this JRTASK.

Update the parent feature handoff with task result, changed files, validation evidence, and next task readiness. Commit focused changes if this workflow uses per-task commits.
